evidence: The Random Forest model extracted impurity-based importance directly (ranger$variable.importance), and the paper ranks features prominently: "Left atrial volume index (LAVI) consistently emerged as the most important predictor in all models" and identifies P-wave parameters among top-ranked features. However, this ranking received adequate validation through SHAP analysis ("supports the thesis that all three models consistently use a similar set of clinically predictors") and permutation feature importance with cross-validated SHAP stability checks showing "median importances for the leading features are stable with relatively narrow interquartile ranges."
